title: Salesforce Power of Us Program
description: Salesforce Power of Us Program provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, cloud credits, fundraising tools, productivity tools, nonprofit consulting under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Donated or discounted Salesforce nonprofit technology, learning resources, and ecosystem support.
